responses.summary: You're right — the deleted test wasn't pure existence. It covered AUTOCOMPACT_BENCHMARK.md (kept, ROADMAP #92), tests/benchmarks/run-benchmark.sh (kept), task suite (kept), canary facts (kept) AND the workflow (deleted). Created tests/test-autocompact-methodology.sh (433 lines) which ports the non-workflow coverage: 23 tests (8 methodology + 5 harness + 4 task suite + 3 canary + 2 wizard integration). All 23 green. Workflow-specific tests (test_workflow_dispatch, test_workflow_matrix, test_workflow_threshold_env) stay deleted — the workflow is gone. Wired into .github/workflows/ci.yml + CONTRIBUTING.md. Commit: 550fd7f
responses.evidence: tests/test-autocompact-methodology.sh (new, 23/23 green); .github/workflows/ci.yml line 175 ('Run autocompact methodology tests' step); CONTRIBUTING.md run-block.

responses.summary: TESTING.md stale refs cleaned. Replaced `tests/test-autocompact-benchmark.sh` row + run-block entry with `tests/test-autocompact-methodology.sh`. Dropped `tests/test-model-comparison.sh` rows entirely (workflow gone). Verified via grep — only CHANGELOG.md (history, not rewriting) still references the deleted names. Commit: 550fd7f
responses.evidence: TESTING.md no longer matches `test-autocompact-benchmark` or `test-model-comparison`; grep -rn across .github/, tests/, scripts/, docs/, *.md returns only CHANGELOG.md.
